objective: Close F-0065 statically with a legacy-safe durable learning_suggestion lifecycle bound to the exact exam_report revision, one automatic attempt after completed report materialization, bounded stale/failed recovery, and an authoritative safe learner retry projection.
blockedFiles: any migration apply, real database/data, real Provider/network call, Prompt Registry/template semantic change, permission, entitlement, quota, dependency, deployment, secret/env, PR, force-push or mechanism change

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: authorized completed exam_report -> persisted lifecycle claim bound to report revision and input digest -> existing whole-report input -> bounded Provider attempt -> attempt-bound terminal CAS -> learner-safe status projection
preRedImpactScan.currentVulnerableSink: completed report materialization persists only a null snapshot, explicit retry is the only execution path, null is rendered as permanently generating, and no durable attempt/failure/recovery state exists
preRedImpactScan.securityInvariant: authorization precedes report/task facts; at most one attempt owns a report revision; stale or late execution cannot persist; failure never blocks score facts and never exposes raw errors
preRedImpactScan.legitimateBehavior: one automatic attempt for a completed report, read-only replay after success, stable failed state with bounded retry, and no suggestion task for partial or terminated reports
preRedImpactScan.bundleDisposition: F-0176 whole-report input and F-0175 blocked-gate closure are prerequisites; F-0177 usage provenance remains independent

requiredSemantics.schema: additive legacy-nullable version-discriminated pending/running/succeeded/failed lifecycle columns with strict all-state coherence, lowercase SHA-256 input digest, safe failure category and fixed bounded attempt count; no backfill or destructive/data SQL
requiredSemantics.claim: after owner and current authorization validation, one authoritative repository transaction locks the exact report row and claims pending, retryable failed or provably stale running state for the exact positive report revision; all other callers are read-only or conflict
requiredSemantics.attemptIdentity: reportPublicId plus reportRevision plus attemptCount plus claimedAt plus inputDigest; every success/failure CAS must match all facts and task status running with exactly one affected row
requiredSemantics.automatic: completed report creation or authoritative completed rebuild persists pending before execution and performs one automatic attempt; partial/terminated reports never call Provider; a failed suggestion never rolls back or hides score report facts
requiredSemantics.timeoutRecovery: hard AbortSignal timeout plus abort cleanup margin is strictly below a fixed stale reclaim threshold; timeout, abort, Provider failure or crash cannot allow late success; stale running and failed attempts are bounded and recoverable without duplicate concurrent execution
requiredSemantics.orphanPendingRecovery: a report transaction committed before automatic execution may leave pending; the same claim command can recover it, and authorized manual retry projects overdue pending as retryable after a bounded wait without any GET/detail/history side effect
requiredSemantics.rebuild: any report scoring-fact revision change atomically clears old suggestion and resets current completed reports to pending; old attempt completion cannot attach to the new revision
requiredSemantics.replay: succeeded current revision with valid immutable F-0176 provenance is pure read-only; response loss or duplicate retry produces zero Provider and zero write; corrupt lifecycle/provenance fails closed
requiredSemantics.projection: DTO exposes only authoritative lifecycle status, stable safe failure category and server-calculated canRetry; UI never infers from null, only retries the encoded exact report publicId, disables duplicate clicks and refreshes exact detail
requiredSemantics.privacy: no raw Provider error, prompt, report input, answer, citation, path, stack or internal id enters lifecycle fields, response, logs or UI
requiredSemantics.unchanged: F-0176 input and revision contract, F-0175 blocked-gate boundary, F-0067 report finalization, Prompt Registry, authorization, quota, Provider configuration/call count, dependencies and mechanisms remain unchanged

minimumAdversarialTests: new completed report persists pending before one automatic attempt; partial report creates no attempt; suggestion failure still returns an intact score report with failed status
two concurrent automatic/manual claimers have one winner and one Provider call; running non-stale is not reclaimed
hard timeout is below stale threshold, aborts execution, records only a safe failure and rejects late success
stale running and failed retry claim a new attempt; fixed cap exhaustion exposes canRetry false and calls Provider zero times
report rebuild during execution increments revision, resets lifecycle and makes old success/failure CAS affect zero rows
success/failure finalize row count zero or greater than one fails closed; response loss replay after success is read-only
legacy null lifecycle, legacy existing snapshot, partial-null corrupt rows, invalid digest/category/timestamps and snapshot/status mismatch are distinguished and fail safely
authorization and owner masking occur before lifecycle lookup/claim; cross-user request performs zero lifecycle and Provider calls
UI shows pending/running/failed/succeeded/unavailable truthfully, retries only failed retryable exact report, prevents double submit and refreshes exact detail
migration source contains only approved enum/nullable columns/check/index metadata and no backfill, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, TRUNCATE or apply
F-0067 scoring finalization, F-0176 input/provenance, F-0175 production blocked-gate, report history/detail and AI log regressions remain GREEN

validationCommands.name: state-and-schema-source-contract
arguments: validates the F-0065 task state and additive migration source
